top_signals.title: Japan’s 40-Year Yield Rises 10 Basis Points on Inflation Fears
top_signals.summary: Japan’s 40-year government bond yield rose 10 basis points, as investors remain unconvinced that the nation’s central bank will tighten policy fast enough to quell inflation.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Tassat wants to help smaller banks tap the trillion-dollar stablecoin boom before Wall Street lock them out
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: The Largest Stablecoins Ranked
top_signals.summary: In recent years, stablecoins have emerged as crypto’s breakout use case. Assets that were created to streamline cryptocurrency trading are now being recognized as a more efficient, flexible, transparent medium of exchange for the world financial system. The total stablecoin market cap has surged on the back of this newfound attention, growing to $300 billion […]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Volkswagen expects full-year revenue squeeze after quarterly profit slump
top_signals.summary: German auto giant Volkswagen on Friday reported weaker-than-expected second-quarter profit and revised down its sales forecast for 2026.

top_signals.title: Allianz to buy HSBC’s Singapore insurance unit for $2.09 billion
top_signals.summary: Allianz to acquire Singapore insurance business from HSBC
